title: Product vision brief: PM judgment amplifier
durable_vision: ProductOS becomes the repo-native operating system that helps a PM see what matters, explain the bet, and move from evidence to action without rebuilding context by hand.
near_term_product_goal: Make strategy and discovery outputs coherent enough that a PM can choose the next bet from one reviewable repo-native packet.
problem_space_summary: ProductOS can already structure PM work, but it is weaker at making strategic intent, value, and north-star logic explicit before concept and PRD work.
solution_direction_summary: Add a strategy spine ahead of market posture and problem framing so discovery outputs carry mission linkage, product vision, value proposition, and metric logic.
customer_value_statement: PMs spend less time reconstructing strategic intent and more time deciding what to believe, prioritize, and test next.
business_value_statement: A sharper strategy spine makes ProductOS easier to buy, trust, and extend without broadening the claim surface prematurely.
differentiation_statement: ProductOS links mission, evidence, market posture, and downstream product decisions in repo-native contracts instead of relying on loose docs or hidden prompt behavior.
north_star_definition: Elapsed time from mission intake to a reviewable strategy and problem-framing packet that a PM can use to choose the next bet.

input_guardrail_metrics.definition: Percent of discovery packets with explicit mission, strategy, and market references.
Count of strategy recommendations that cannot be traced to mission, research, or market evidence.

next_bets: Make strategy context reusable before expanding discovery depth.
Preserve strategy refs through market strategy, problem framing, and PRD generation.
open_questions: How much of buyer trust comes from strategic clarity versus execution proof at this stage?

evidence_refs.justification: The strategy context defines the portfolio fit, business outcomes, and constraints for the next slice.
The market posture shows how the vision should differentiate before concept work continues.
